prompt: generate a receipt that looks like a slightly glowing thermal receipt printed in both English and Lunar Glyphs. Lists: 1 Oxygen Smoothie, 2 Gravity-Free Espresso Pods. Includes a digital signature and “Carbon Offset: 0.02kg CO₂”.
prompt_refined: Generate an image of a thermal receipt that appears slightly glowing and has the characteristic texture of thermal paper. The text on the receipt must be printed in both English and distinct Lunar Glyphs, with both language versions present for each line item. Clearly list the following purchases in the main body of the receipt: '1 Oxygen Smoothie' and '2 Gravity-Free Espresso Pods'. Below the itemized list, include the line: 'Carbon Offset: 0.02kg CO₂'. At the very bottom of the receipt, include a clean, modern digital signature.
